queries.question: Which responsibility is shared among all internships?
queries.sql: SELECT Responsibilities.responsibility  from Internships_Responsibilities join Responsibilities on Internships_Responsibilities.responsibilityId = Responsibilities.id join Internships on Internships_Responsibilities.internshipId = Internships.id   GROUP BY Internships_Responsibilities.responsibilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Internships_Responsibilities.internshipId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Internships)

queries.question: For each internship, could you provide the corresponding responsibility?
queries.sql: select internships.title , responsibilities.responsibility from Internships_Responsibilities join Responsibilities on Internships_Responsibilities.responsibilityId = Responsibilities.id join Internships on Internships_Responsibilities.internshipId = Internships.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?responsibility WHERE {
  ?internships_responsibilities a :Internships_Responsibilities .
  ?responsibilities a :Responsibilities .
  ?internships_responsibilities p:hasResponsibilities ?responsibilities .
  ?internships a :Internships .
  ?internships_responsibilities p:hasInternships ?internships .
  ?internships p:title ?title .
  ?responsibilities p:responsibility ?responsibility .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which responsibilities are associated with each internship?
